card.flavor_text: The desert is a voracious beast, devouring both flesh and stone.
card.name: Abrade
card.oracle_text:
Choose one —
• Abrade deals 3 damage to target creature.
• Destroy target artifact.

card.name: Consult the Star Charts
card.oracle_text:
Kicker {1}{U} (You may pay an additional {1}{U} as you cast this spell.)
Look at the top X cards of your library, where X is the number of lands you control. Put one of those cards into your hand. If this spell was kicked, put two of those cards into your hand instead. Put the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order.

card.flavor_text: Every spire is a physical dedication to the Way.
card.name: Cori Mountain Monastery
card.oracle_text:
This land enters tapped unless you control a Plains or an Island.
{T}: Add {R}.
{3}{R}, {T}: Exile the top card of your library. Until the end of your next turn, you may play that card.

card.flavor_text: Clerics on both sides prayed for divine intervention to end the war. The gods didn't play favorites.
card.name: Day of Judgment
card.oracle_text: Destroy all creatures.

card.flavor_text: Quintorius found that every new discovery motivated him to keep exploring.
card.name: Flashback
card.oracle_text: Target instant or sorcery card in your graveyard gains flashback until end of turn. The flashback cost is equal to its mana cost. (You may cast that card from your graveyard for its flashback cost. Then exile it.)

card.flavor_text: Here, the Mistmoors slump like a grieving parent, the once-thriving fields drowned by the relentless deluge.
card.name: Floodfarm Verge
card.oracle_text:
{T}: Add {W}.
{T}: Add {U}. Activate only if you control a Plains or an Island.

card.name: Great Hall of the Biblioplex
card.oracle_text:
{T}: Add {C}.
{T}, Pay 1 life: Add one mana of any color. Spend this mana only to cast an instant or sorcery spell.
{5}: If this land isn't a creature, it becomes a 2/4 Wizard creature with "Whenever you cast an instant or sorcery spell, this creature gets +1/+0 until end of turn." It's still a land.

card.flavor_text: The merrow was vending her wares when the skies darkened, then she sharply raised her prices.
card.name: Hallowed Fountain
card.oracle_text:
({T}: Add {W} or {U}.)
As this land enters, you may pay 2 life. If you don't, it enters tapped.

card.flavor_text:
"We came seeking a challenge. It seems we must continue searching."
—Zurgo, khan of the Mardu
card.name: Inevitable Defeat
card.oracle_text:
This spell can't be countered.
Exile target nonland permanent. Its controller loses 3 life and you gain 3 life.

card.flavor_text:
"No one of us could have built all this alone. A clan, a school, hope for the future. Thank you all."
—Narset, to Shiko, Taigam, and Elsha
card.name: Jeskai Revelation
card.oracle_text: Return target spell or permanent to its owner's hand. Jeskai Revelation deals 4 damage to any target. Create two 1/1 white Monk creature tokens with prowess. Draw two cards. You gain 4 life.

card.flavor_text: After heavy casualties in the Phyrexian invasion, the Boros mage-priests trained as many rank-and-file soldiers as possible to wield the Legion's legendary battle magic.
card.name: Lightning Helix
card.oracle_text: Lightning Helix deals 3 damage to any target and you gain 3 life.

card.flavor_text: Built on a fumarole field, the village is a refuge of warmth amid the ice of the Qal Sisma mountains.
card.name: Mistrise Village
card.oracle_text:
This land enters tapped unless you control a Mountain or a Forest.
{T}: Add {U}.
{U}, {T}: The next spell you cast this turn can't be countered.

card.flavor_text: New worlds await...
card.name: Multiversal Passage
card.oracle_text:
As this land enters, choose a basic land type. Then you may pay 2 life. If you don't, it enters tapped.
This land is the chosen type.

card.flavor_text:
"Lies fester and flourish in shadow. Our job is to bathe them in light."
—Ezrim, Agency chief
card.name: No More Lies
card.oracle_text: Counter target spell unless its controller pays {3}. If that spell is countered this way, exile it instead of putting it into its owner's graveyard.

card.flavor_text: Glyph has claimed to be a survivor of an alien war, a deposed minister of weather, and the last of the dinosaurs. Whatever the truth, his origin stories always bear a lesson.
card.name: North Wind Avatar
card.oracle_text:
Flying
When this creature enters, if you cast it, you may put a card you own from outside the game into your hand.

card.flavor_text:
"While Loot's ability to predict Omenpaths is extraordinary, I'm more impressed by his unrelenting curiosity."
—Pia Nalaar
card.name: Riverpyre Verge
card.oracle_text:
{T}: Add {R}.
{T}: Add {U}. Activate only if you control an Island or a Mountain.

card.flavor_text:
"Log 2.2.119: Kiln, known for its blazing forges and ancient lava seeps. The footing may be treacherous, but the metallurgy is grand!"
—*Maisie's Edge Chronicles*
card.name: Sacred Foundry
card.oracle_text:
({T}: Add {R} or {W}.)
As this land enters, you may pay 2 life. If you don't, it enters tapped.

card.flavor_text: Everything becomes kindling at the right temperature.
card.name: Sear
card.oracle_text: Sear deals 4 damage to target creature or planeswalker.

card.flavor_text:
"The most cordial words are often the ones intended to deceive. It's only of late that I've realized how much strength honesty requires."
—Embrose, dean of shadow
card.name: Shattered Sanctum
card.oracle_text:
This land enters tapped unless you control two or more other lands.
{T}: Add {W} or {B}.

card.flavor_text:
"As long as we have the will to fight, we are never without weapons."
—Koth of the Hammer
card.name: Slagstorm
card.oracle_text:
Choose one —
• Slagstorm deals 3 damage to each creature.
• Slagstorm deals 3 damage to each player.

card.flavor_text: The flamekin was drawn toward warm laughter when the skies darkened, then she turned back to the lonely peak.
card.name: Steam Vents
card.oracle_text:
({T}: Add {U} or {R}.)
As this land enters, you may pay 2 life. If you don't, it enters tapped.

card.flavor_text: "We are now accepting over eleven different interplanar currencies, including polished moonfall!"
card.name: Stock Up
card.oracle_text: Look at the top five cards of your library. Put two of them into your hand and the rest on the bottom of your library in any order.

card.flavor_text:
"Careful ideation crashes together with wild creativity. Though I am grateful to be made dean, I've found it difficult to represent just the one side."
—Veyran, dean of perfection
card.name: Stormcarved Coast
card.oracle_text:
This land enters tapped unless you control two or more other lands.
{T}: Add {U} or {R}.

card.flavor_text: Leaving no stone unturned is just the beginning.
card.name: Tablet of Discovery
card.oracle_text:
When this artifact enters, mill a card. You may play that card this turn. (To mill a card, put the top card of your library into your graveyard.)
{T}: Add {R}.
{T}: Add {R}{R}. Spend this mana only to cast instant and sorcery spells.

card.flavor_text: She'd planned for every eventuality, with the obvious exception of failure.
card.name: Three Steps Ahead
card.oracle_text:
Spree (Choose one or more additional costs.)
+ {1}{U} — Counter target spell.
+ {3} — Create a token that's a copy of target artifact or creature you control.
+ {2} — Draw two cards, then discard a card.

card.name: Thunder Magic
card.oracle_text:
Tiered (Choose one additional cost.)
• Thunder — {0} — Thunder Magic deals 2 damage to target creature.
• Thundara — {3} — Thunder Magic deals 4 damage to target creature.
• Thundaga — {5}{R} — Thunder Magic deals 8 damage to target creature.

card.flavor_text:
"Log 2.9.089: Lammuat, the cemetery moon of salvage and secrets. Could be profitable for those brave enough to plumb its recesses."
—*Maisie's Edge Chronicles*
card.name: Watery Grave
card.oracle_text:
({T}: Add {U} or {B}.)
As this land enters, you may pay 2 life. If you don't, it enters tapped.

review.basis: Pinned 60-card main deck reviewed against card rules text.
